set.xpath: /quests/quest[(starts-with(@id,'tier6_') or starts-with(@id,'tier7_') or starts-with(@id,'tier8_') or starts-with(@id,'tier9_') or starts-with(@id,'tier10_')) and contains(@id,'_superinfested')]/reward[@type='Item' and @id='casinoCoin']/@value

/quests/quest[(starts-with(@id,'tier6_') or starts-with(@id,'tier7_') or starts-with(@id,'tier8_') or starts-with(@id,'tier9_') or starts-with(@id,'tier10_')) and (contains(@id,'_ultrainfested') or contains(@id,'_nightmare'))]/reward[@type='Item' and @id='casinoCoin']/@value

/quests/quest[(starts-with(@id,'tier6_') or starts-with(@id,'tier7_') or starts-with(@id,'tier8_') or starts-with(@id,'tier9_') or starts-with(@id,'tier10_')) and contains(@id,'_superinfested')]/property[@name='reward_choices_count']/@value

/quests/quest[(starts-with(@id,'tier6_') or starts-with(@id,'tier7_') or starts-with(@id,'tier8_') or starts-with(@id,'tier9_') or starts-with(@id,'tier10_')) and (contains(@id,'_ultrainfested') or contains(@id,'_nightmare'))]/property[@name='reward_choices_count']/@value

/quests/quest[starts-with(@id,'tier2_') and contains(@id,'_superinfested')]/reward[@type='LootItem' and (contains(@id,'groupQuestWeapons') or contains(@id,'groupQuestTools') or contains(@id,'groupQuestArmor'))]/@value

/quests/quest[starts-with(@id,'tier3_') and contains(@id,'_superinfested')]/reward[@type='LootItem' and (contains(@id,'groupQuestWeapons') or contains(@id,'groupQuestTools') or contains(@id,'groupQuestArmor'))]/@value

/quests/quest[starts-with(@id,'tier4_') and contains(@id,'_superinfested')]/reward[@type='LootItem' and (contains(@id,'groupQuestWeapons') or contains(@id,'groupQuestTools') or contains(@id,'groupQuestArmor'))]/@value

/quests/quest[(starts-with(@id,'tier5_') or starts-with(@id,'tier6_') or starts-with(@id,'tier7_') or starts-with(@id,'tier8_') or starts-with(@id,'tier9_') or starts-with(@id,'tier10_')) and contains(@id,'_superinfested')]/reward[@type='LootItem' and (contains(@id,'groupQuestWeapons') or contains(@id,'groupQuestTools') or contains(@id,'groupQuestArmor'))]/@value

/quests/quest[starts-with(@id,'tier2_') and (contains(@id,'_ultrainfested') or contains(@id,'_nightmare'))]/reward[@type='LootItem' and (contains(@id,'groupQuestWeapons') or contains(@id,'groupQuestTools') or contains(@id,'groupQuestArmor'))]/@value

/quests/quest[starts-with(@id,'tier3_') and (contains(@id,'_ultrainfested') or contains(@id,'_nightmare'))]/reward[@type='LootItem' and (contains(@id,'groupQuestWeapons') or contains(@id,'groupQuestTools') or contains(@id,'groupQuestArmor'))]/@value

/quests/quest[starts-with(@id,'tier4_') and (contains(@id,'_ultrainfested') or contains(@id,'_nightmare'))]/reward[@type='LootItem' and (contains(@id,'groupQuestWeapons') or contains(@id,'groupQuestTools') or contains(@id,'groupQuestArmor'))]/@value

/quests/quest[starts-with(@id,'tier5_') and (contains(@id,'_ultrainfested') or contains(@id,'_nightmare'))]/reward[@type='LootItem' and (contains(@id,'groupQuestWeapons') or contains(@id,'groupQuestTools') or contains(@id,'groupQuestArmor'))]/@value

/quests/quest[(starts-with(@id,'tier6_') or starts-with(@id,'tier7_') or starts-with(@id,'tier8_') or starts-with(@id,'tier9_') or starts-with(@id,'tier10_')) and (contains(@id,'_ultrainfested') or contains(@id,'_nightmare'))]/reward[@type='LootItem' and (contains(@id,'groupQuestWeapons') or contains(@id,'groupQuestTools') or contains(@id,'groupQuestArmor'))]/@value
